plan_adherence_notes: Compared with `1b0e9cab`, this branch only adds `.fleet/tasks/bayes-market-0zg-execute-step-5-execute-step-5/plan.json` and `.fleet/tasks/bayes-market-0zg-execute-step-5-execute-step-5/research.json`; there is no execution artifact or other diff showing that step 5 was actually carried out on-branch. During validation, the prescribed checks did succeed in the current checkout: `pytest` on the seven named `/v1/markets` methods passed 7/7, `pnpm test -- src/__tests__/api-client.test.ts src/__tests__/MarketList.test.tsx src/__tests__/System.test.tsx src/__tests__/MarketDetail.test.tsx` passed but broadened to 9 files / 56 tests, and the direct scoped replay `pnpm exec vitest run ...` passed the intended 4 files / 28 tests. The current code also still matches the research-noted gap in `frontend/src/__tests__/MarketDetail.test.tsx`, which does not assert `listMarkets({ includeResolved: true })` and still returns contradictory `meta.filters.include_resolved: false`.
missed_questions: How should this verification-only leaf record execution results in the diff so validation can confirm the commands were actually run when no production files change?
reason: The plan and research are coherent and the targeted checks pass in the current checkout, but this branch itself never records the step-5 execution it planned. It only adds planning artifacts, and the unresolved MarketDetail opt-in coverage gap noted by the research still exists.
